title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending the Public Employment Service Office (PESO) of Laguna Province, Headed by Ms. Mary Jane B. Corcuera, Under the Leadership of Hon. Governor Ramil I. Hernandez, for Being Conferred As the Regional Bayanihan Service Awardee for First Class Province Category. (AUTHOR: HON. MIKO C. PELEGRINA CO-AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 07/05/2021)
